subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Verily thou art steadfast in the Cause of God and firmly established in His love amidst the winds of tests [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر میثاق حقا که مستقیم بر امراللهی و مستقر در محبت الله اریاح افتتان
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
